Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9670 "AlternativeFormats\PRGs\Uncrunched\Fast Break.prg,0x0334,0x008D" -Di_table_addr=0x02 -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $06a3 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0669 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Fast Break.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Add an init routine at $0669 which: 1. Sets up the correct VICII settings for the second loading screen to be displayed correctly 2. Sets 4 bytes of return address data at the top of the stack ($01FC - $01FF) 3. Sets the stack pointer to $FB to give the correct next available location on the stack (i.e. just below the address data copied in step 2) 4. Sets the memory bank setup to $36 (in $01) 5. Finally jumps to the start address of $9670 (it doesn't use RTS because of the stack manipulation above)
Note: dumping should be performed on the second hit on $9670 (i.e. after the second loading screen is displayed).
